description_long: This is a sealed, rectangular plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Molokhia Chopped, featuring a predominantly white background with green leaf graphics and a large, vibrant image of chopped green molokhia leaves at the bottom front. The front displays the Faragello brand logo in red and white, along with bilingual product labeling in English and Arabic. The back side contains a detailed nutrition facts panel, multiple translations of product information, and additional branding elements. The sides of the bag are narrow and show a continuation of the leaf motif, with minimal text or graphics. The packaging appears slightly puffed, suggesting it is filled with air to protect the contents. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for display in a grocery or convenience store.
description: A white, rectangular plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Molokhia Chopped with green leaf graphics, a red brand logo, and a clear image of chopped greens on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Faragello logo, product name in English and Arabic, green leaf graphics, and a large image of chopped molokhia.
description_view_1: The left side view is narrow, displaying mostly the white background and partial leaf graphics, with little to no text visible.
description_view_2: The back view features a nutrition facts panel, multilingual product information, and additional branding elements.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a slim profile with partial leaf graphics and minimal text.
attribute_brand_logo: The Faragello brand logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a red rectangular background with white stylized text and a leaf graphic above the 'F'.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package shows an image of chopped green molokhia leaves and the text 'Frozen Molokhia Chopped', indicating the product's flavor and contents.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories and other nutritional information.
